---
title: "Week 7"
date: 03-08-26
description: |
  This week focuses on statistical estimators.
editor: source
draft: false
---


| Lecture   | Slides                       | Annotated  | Video     |
|-----------|------------------------------|------------|-----------|
| Monday    | [Slides](../lectures/7a.pdf) | [Slides](../lectures/7a_annotated.pdf) | [Video](https://youtu.be/-gnYzlGYuVs) |
| Wednesday | [Slides](../lectures/7b.pdf) | [Slides](../lectures/7b_annotated.pdf) | [Video]()  |
